value.rationale: The page's navigation explicitly lists "Evals" (Getting started, Working with evals, Graders, etc.) and "Integrations and observability" / "Evaluate agent workflows" under the Agents SDK. The cookbook itself builds an agent improvement loop using OpenAI traces and evals, substantiating that OpenAI offers evals & observability capabilities.
